title: LLM Wiki – example of an "idea file"

Download ZIP llm-wiki Raw llm-wiki.md LLM Wiki A pattern for building personal knowledge bases using LLMs. This is an idea file, it is designed to be copy pasted to your own LLM Agent (e.g. OpenAI Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode / Pi, or etc.). Its goal is to communicate the high level idea, but your agent will build out the specifics in collaboration with you. The core idea Most people's experience with LLMs and documents looks like RAG: you upload a collection of files, the LLM retrieves relevant chunks at query time, and generates an answer. This works, but the LLM is rediscovering knowledge from scratch on every question. There's no accumulation. Ask a subtle question that requires synthesizing five documents, and the LLM has to find and piece together the relevant fragments every time. Nothing is built up. NotebookLM, ChatGPT file uploads, and most RAG systems work this way. The idea here is different. Instead of just retrieving from raw documents at query time, the LLM incrementally builds and maintains a persistent wiki — a structured, interlinked collection of markdown files that sits between you and the raw sources. When you add a new source, the LLM doesn't just index it for later retrieval. It reads it, extracts the key information, and integrates it into the existing wiki — updating entity pages, revising topic summaries, noting where new data contradicts old claims, strengthening or challenging the evolving synthesis. The knowledge is compiled once and then kept current , not re-derived on every query. This is the key difference: the wiki is a persistent, compoundin
summary_zh: LLM Wiki 是一个关于如何使用大型语言模型（LLM）构建个人知识库的“想法文件”示例，由知名AI研究员Andrej Karpathy在GitHub上以Gist形式分享。该项目提出了一种超越传统检索增强生成（RAG）模式的知识管理新范式。，其核心理念在于，当前多数基于LLM的文档交互（如NotebookLM、ChatGPT文件上传及常见RAG系统）采用“查询时检索”模式：用户上传文件集，LLM在每次提问时检索相关文本片段并生成答案。这种方式下，LLM每次都需要从零开始重新发现知识，缺乏积累。对于需要综合多份文档信息的复杂问题，模型必须反复查找和拼凑片段，无法构建持续演化的知识体系。，LLM Wiki 提出的方案则截然不同。它旨在让LLM增量式地构建和维护一个持久化的维基（Wiki）——一个位于用户与原始资料之间的、结构化的、相互链接的Markdown文件集合。当用户添加新的资料源时，LLM不仅仅是为后续检索建立索引，而是会主动阅读内容、提取关键信息，并将其整合到现有的维基中。具体操作包括更新实体页面、修订主题摘要、标注新旧数据之间的矛盾之处，从而强化或挑战不断演化的知识综合体。，这种方法的关键价值在于知识被“编译一次，持续更新”，而非每次查询时重新推导。该维基作为一个持久化的、可复合增长的知识中间层，允许知识持续积累和精炼。这个想法文件本身设计用于被复制粘贴到用户自己的LLM智能体（如OpenAI Codex、Claude Code等）中，其目标是传达高层概念，具体的实现细节将由智能体与用户协作完成。

title: Components of a Coding Agent
content: Components of A Coding Agent - by Sebastian Raschka, PhD Subscribe Sign in Components of A Coding Agent How coding agents use tools, memory, and repo context to make LLMs work better in practice Sebastian Raschka, PhD Apr 04, 2026 309 28 28 Share In this article, I want to cover the overall design of coding agents and agent harnesses: what they are, how they work, and how the different pieces fit together in practice. Readers of my Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch) and Build a Large Reasoning Model (From Scratch) books often ask about agents, so I thought it would be useful to write a reference I can point to. More generally, agents have become an important topic because much of the recent progress in practical LLM systems is not just about better models, but about how we use them. In many real-world applications, the surrounding system, such as tool use, context management, and memory, plays as much of a role as the model itself. This also helps explain why systems like Claude Code or Codex can feel significantly more capable than the same models used in a plain chat interface. In this article, I lay out six of the main building blocks of a coding agent. Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Other Coding Agents You are probably familiar with Claude Code or the Codex CLI, but just to set the stage, they are essentially agentic coding tools that wrap an LLM in an application layer, a so-called agentic harness, to be more convenient and better-performing for coding tasks. Figure 1: Claude Code CLI, Codex CLI, and my Mini Coding Agent . Coding agents are engineered for software work where the notable parts are not only the model choice but the surrounding system, including repo context, tool design, prompt-cache stability, memory, and long-session continuity. That distinction matters because when we talk about the coding capabilities of LLMs, people often collapse the model, the reasoning behavior, and the agent product into one thing. But before getting into the coding agent specifics, let me briefly provide a bit more context on the difference between the broader concepts, the LLMs, reasoning models, and agents. On The Relationship Between LLMs, Reasoning Models, and Agents An LLM is the core next-token model. A reasoning model is still an LLM, but usually one that was trained and/or prompted to spend more inference-time compute on intermediate reasoning, verification, or search over candidate answers. An agent is a layer on top, which can be understood as a control loop around the model. Typically, given a goal, the agent layer (or harness) decides what to inspect next, which tools to call, how to update its state, and when to stop, etc. Roughly, we can think about the relationship as this: the LLM is the engine, a reasoning model is a beefed-up engine (more powerful, but more expensive to use), and an agent harness helps us the model. The analogy is not perfect, because we can also use conventional and reasoning LLMs as standalone models (in a c
title_zh: 编程智能体的构成要素
summary_zh: 在本文中，作者Sebastian Raschka博士探讨了编程智能体（Coding Agent）的整体设计及其核心组件，旨在阐明其工作原理及实际应用中的系统整合方式。编程智能体如Claude Code和Codex CLI等，本质上是将大型语言模型（LLM）封装在应用层（即“智能体框架”或agentic harness）中的工具，通过优化上下文管理、工具调用和记忆机制，显著提升模型在编程任务中的实际表现。，文章指出，当前实用LLM系统的进步不仅依赖于模型本身的改进，更在于其周边系统的设计，包括工具使用、上下文管理和记忆功能。这些因素共同解释了为何Claude Code或Codex等系统比单纯在聊天界面中使用相同模型显得更强大。，作者将编程智能体的主要构建模块归纳为六大部分，并强调在软件工程中，智能体的关键不仅在于模型选择，还涉及仓库上下文（repo context）、工具设计、提示缓存稳定性、记忆机制以及长会话连续性等系统要素。这一区分至关重要，因为人们在讨论LLM的编程能力时，常将模型、推理行为和智能体产品混为一谈。，文章进一步厘清了LLM、推理模型（Reasoning Model）和智能体（Agent）之间的关系：LLM是核心的下一个词元预测模型；推理模型本质上仍是LLM，但通过训练或提示设计，在推理过程中投入更多计算资源进行中间推理、验证或答案搜索；而智能体则是上层的控制循环框架，负责根据目标决定下一步检查内容、调用何种工具、如何更新状态以及何时停止等。，简言之，LLM如同引擎，推理模型是强化版引擎（更强大但使用成本更高），而智能体框架则帮助我们更有效地驾驭模型。尽管这一类比并不完美（因为传统LLM和推理模型也可独立使用），但它有助于理解智能体在整合模型与外部工具及环境中的作用。，通过系统化地结合工具、记忆和仓库上下文，编程智能体能够更可靠地执行复杂编码任务，体现了当前LLM应用从单纯模型优化向整体系统设计演进的重要趋势。

title: Getting Claude to QA its own work
content: Getting Claude to QA its own work Just a brief recap: people use Skyvern to automate the repetitive browser work nobody wants to do: pulling invoices from vendor portals, filling out healthcare forms, extracting data from sites that don’t have APIs. You can try it out here: https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/Skyvern We’ve been using Claude code a lot and kept running into the same failure mode: the code looks kinda right, type checks pass, but when you go to test the changes, something’s off: button doesn’t fire, form overflows or the UI is inconsistent in some small but obvious way. After going back and forth a few times.. it finally works, but it feels wrong to do the QA yourself. So.. we started wondering: can we use Skyvern to automate the QA process? TL;DR: We shipped an MCP server with 33 browser tools (sessions, navigation, form filling, data extraction, credential management, workflows). We added it to Claude Code and asked it to check its own work after every frontend change by opening the page, looking at the pixels, and running the interactions. With these changes, we were able to one-shot about 70% of our PRs (up from ~30%), and it cut our QA loop in half. We wrapped that into /qa (local) and /smoke-test (CI) skills you can try right now: pip install skyvern skyvern setup claude-code # or if you're using other coding agents skyvern setup It reads your git diff, generates test cases, opens a browser, runs them, and gives you a PASS/FAIL table. The whole prompt is ~700 lines and open source: https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern/blob/main/skyvern/cli/skills/qa/SKILL.md How we built it Getting Claude to QA wasn’t as simple as prompting: “QA your own work” (although this works pretty well). Instead, we broke it down into a few phases: Understand the change by doing git diff Classify the diff into a few categories: Frontend , Backend , and Mixed Identify a validation strategy (ie determine how much of the dev server should we run?) Run a full QA of the impacted areas (Backend, Front-end by running a local browser) Report results (Bonus) Post evidence to a PR Sample output: # Test Result Notes 1 Settings page renders PASS 2 “Save” button triggers API call PASS 3 Error state on invalid email FAIL error div has z-index: 0 4 Back to dashboard navigation PASS Running in the CI Pipeline is where the real magic is Once Claude can inspect the diff, decide what changed, and run a browser against the impacted surfaces, the next step is obvious: do that automatically on every PR. So we built a /smoke-test skill that runs the same basic loop in CI and saves the results back into Skyvern for review. The skill is ~300 lines and is published here: https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern/blob/main/skyvern/cli/skills/smoke-test/SKILL.md The flow is roughly: A GitHub Action runs on a PR It looks at the diff and decides which areas are worth testing It starts the app in the smallest environment that still makes sense for the change It runs a browser-based smoke tes
title_zh: 让Claude对自己的工作进行质量检查
summary_zh: 让Claude审查自身代码：Skyvern如何通过浏览器自动化将AI编程的QA通过率提升至70%，Skyvern是一个用于自动化重复性浏览器操作（如从供应商门户拉取发票、填写医疗表单、从无API的网站提取数据）的工具。团队在使用Claude生成前端代码时，常遇到代码看似正确、类型检查通过，但实际测试时出现按钮无法点击、表单溢出或UI细节不一致等问题。传统的人工QA过程耗时且低效。，为此，团队开发了一个解决方案：利用Skyvern自动化QA流程。他们构建了一个包含33种浏览器工具（会话管理、导航、表单填写、数据提取、凭证管理、工作流等）的MCP服务器，并将其集成到Claude Code中。现在，Claude在每次前端更改后，能自动打开页面、检查像素并运行交互来验证自身工作。，这一改进显著提升了效率：代码更改的一次性通过率从约30%提高到约70%，QA循环时间缩短了一半。团队将此功能封装为两个技能：本地使用的 `/qa` 和持续集成（CI）中使用的 `/smoke-test`。用户可通过 `pip install skyvern` 和 `skyvern setup claude-code` 进行安装体验。该工具会读取git diff、生成测试用例、运行浏览器测试，并输出包含PASS/FAIL结果的表格。整个提示词约700行，已在GitHub开源。，实现过程并非简单地提示“审查你的工作”，而是分为几个阶段：通过git diff理解变更；将变更分类为前端、后端或混合类型；确定验证策略（如决定需要运行多少开发服务器）；对受影响区域运行完整QA（后端和通过本地浏览器的前端测试）；报告结果，并可选择将证据发布到PR。示例输出包括测试项、结果和备注。，在CI流水线中运行的 `/smoke-test` 技能进一步实现了自动化：GitHub Action在PR上触发，分析diff以确定需要测试的范围，在最小化环境中启动应用，并运行基于浏览器的冒烟测试，结果保存至Skyvern供审查。该技能约300行，同样已开源。，这一创新使AI编程助手不仅能生成代码，还能主动验证其正确性，大幅提升了开发流程的可靠性和效率。

title: Writing Lisp is AI resistant and I'm sad
content: Writing Lisp is AI Resistant and I'm Sad — Dan's Musings Dan's Musings Writing Lisp is AI Resistant and I'm Sad Published on April 5, 2026 In an insulting, ironic blow to the neats, the scruffies created an AI that much prefers to write anything but Lisp. I use agentic AI a lot at work to do my job as a DevOps engineer. I use OpenRouter with the Goose CLI tool , and I've gotten a pretty good configuration file going with it. I have lately started writing a tool that converts between different RSS reader formats . I started writing it in Lisp, of course. It's my favorite language. I had a problem though. I had to teach the AI how to use the REPL. Initially, I had it run commands to interact with the REPL via tmux , e.g. tmux capture-pane -t 0.0 -p | tail -n 1 . It worked okay, but I noticed that REPL development was very hard for the AI. Claude really spun its wheels. Lesser AIs would be very much worse. I'd blow $10-$20 in a handful of minutes with not much to show for it but sort of OK lisp code that I ended up rewriting. I tried doing it with cheaper AIs like DeepSeek and Qwen , which I found did OK at work for some tasks, but it wasn't working. I figured maybe if I made REPL development smoother, the AI would do a better job. I wanted to give goose unlimited rights to the REPL while still guarding general command rights, too. So, I created a tool called tmux-repl-mcp that would make interacting with the REPL more straightforward. Instead of consuming a ton of tokens, executing a bunch of sleep commands, and parsing tmux output, the could just run execute_command in the repl and get its output. I wrote this tool in Python since a lot of my AI tooling in my goose configuration file was built around uvx already. I liked that I just had to install uvx and all of a sudden goose could use all these tools. I already had all this stuff built up in my configuration file, so I figured it would be easier for folks to use if it were distributed in the same way. Besides, the official guide to write an MCP server were in non-lisp languages anyway. The difference in writing Python and Lisp with AI was of course dramatic, downright wild. I got it to write all of the code and all the tests for the code. I had to debug it semi-manually, but I was still able to bang together this more-than-nothing tool in like a day or two, and with cheap models at that. Worst of all, the experience for me was the same in many ways: I wrote code by being a poor man's product owner to the AI for both, only the AI would perform well with the Python. I felt none of the happiness I usually feel just writing Lisp. Going back to my actual project was painful. I ended up writing one of the files ( src/newsboat.lisp ) by hand. I was in the middle of debugging it when I realized how much harder it was to write with AI in Lisp. I had to switch back to Claude, which at least makes some progress relative to the others. The tmux-repl-mcp tool helped, but I still blew through $10 in like 30 m
title_zh: 编写Lisp代码能抵抗AI，这让我感到难过
summary_zh: 在2026年4月5日发表的这篇博客中，作者Dan作为一名DevOps工程师，分享了他使用AI辅助编程时遇到的一个令人沮丧的现象：当前的AI（特别是Agentic AI）在编写Lisp代码时表现远不如编写Python等其他语言。，作者日常工作大量使用AI，通过OpenRouter和Goose CLI工具进行配置。在开发一个用于转换不同RSS阅读器格式的工具时，他首选了自己最爱的Lisp语言。然而，他很快发现，让AI（如Claude、DeepSeek、Qwen等模型）在Lisp的REPL（交互式开发环境）中进行开发异常困难。AI难以有效与REPL交互，导致开发效率低下、成本高昂——短短几分钟就可能消耗10-20美元，但产出的代码质量一般，最终仍需人工重写。，为了改善这一状况，作者专门用Python开发了一个名为“tmux-repl-mcp”的工具。该工具旨在简化AI与Lisp REPL的交互过程，使其无需通过复杂的tmux命令和大量token消耗来解析输出，而是能直接执行命令并获取结果。他选择Python是因为其现有的Goose配置和工具链（如uvx）更易于集成和分发。，对比结果令人震惊。在Python项目中，AI能高效地编写全部代码和测试，作者仅需进行半人工调试，用一两天时间和廉价模型就能完成一个可用的工具。然而，回到Lisp项目后，体验截然不同。尽管使用了改进后的tmux-repl-mcp工具并切换回能力稍强的Claude模型，AI辅助Lisp编程依然举步维艰，30分钟就消耗了10美元，进展缓慢。最终，作者不得不手动编写了部分Lisp文件（如src/newsboat.lisp），并深切感受到了在Lisp开发中利用AI的额外难度。，核心结论是，当前的主流AI在理解和生成Lisp代码方面存在显著短板，这与它们处理Python等流行语言的高效形成了鲜明对比。这一现象让热爱Lisp的作者感到悲哀，因为它意味着在AI辅助编程的时代，这门富有表达力的语言可能面临被边缘化的风险。

title: A case study in testing with 100+ Claude agents in parallel
content: A case study in testing with 100+ of Claude agents in parallel - imbue A case study in testing with 100 + of Claude agents in parallel How we're using `mngr` to create (and improve) its own tests and documentation. April 3, 2026 Author The Imbue Team Outline High-level architecture Writing the tutorial script Converting tutorial blocks to pytest functions Orchestrating the tests Software composability Software scalability The future of software development In our previous blog post , we introduced mngr and how you can use it to usefully launch hundreds of parallel agents. Here’s all the details of how we are actually using mngr to run and improve itself, by testing its own demo script. High-level architecture This is how the entire setup works: We start from a tutorial script, tutorial.sh , containing blocks of commands. A block is simply a sequence of consecutive non-empty lines. For each block, we derive one or more pytest function. For each pytest function, we launch an agent to run, debug, fix and improve it. Finally, we integrate the outcome of all the agents together. Let’s dive into how each step works. Writing the tutorial script This script is seeded with a lot of content we wrote ourselves, but it is a bit tiring once we have written 50 or so examples. So we simply: Write some comments in the file, like # Managing snapshots Ask a coding agent to fill in the blank. Review and keep the ones that we like. Since we already have a lot of documentation elsewhere in the codebase—in particular, we have auto-generated man pages committed into the git repo, like this one —the agent does a good job of generating examples! In fact, even when it doesn’t, it’s still useful: that means our interface is too confusing or was not properly documented, and a human may have problems figuring out how to use it too. We then used that signal to refine mngr ’s interface to be as simple as possible. Asking agents to generate examples turned out to be a win-win situation–we either get good examples, or get bad examples and use that to improve mngr itself! Converting tutorial blocks to pytest functions Now that we have a healthy amount of tutorial commands, we can ask a coding agent to convert it into pytest functions. There are a few details worth mentioning. Tutorial blocks tend to be concise and sometimes a bit contrived, but we want tests to be more exhaustive, covering both happy and unhappy paths. So this is a 1:N correspondence: for the same tutorial block, we can expect slight variations of the command itself or the environment to result in different outcomes, and they often deserve separate test cases. In order to preserve the correspondence between tutorial blocks and test functions, we also ask the agent to “declare” which tutorial block it corresponds to, by citing the tutorial block in the function it generates, using a specific API in the test fixture. In order to keep the agent honest, we also use a simple script to check that it’s indeed the case -
title_zh: 一项关于并行测试100多个Claude智能体的案例研究
summary_zh: Imbue团队发布了一项关于并行测试100多个Claude智能体的案例研究，详细介绍了他们如何利用自研工具`mngr`来创建并改进其自身的测试与文档。这项研究展示了利用大规模并行AI代理进行软件开发和测试验证的新范式。，核心流程始于一个包含命令块的教程脚本`tutorial.sh`。每个命令块由一系列连续的非空行组成。系统首先将每个教程块转换成一个或多个pytest测试函数。随后，为每个pytest函数启动一个独立的Claude智能体，负责执行、调试、修复并改进该测试。最终，整合所有智能体的输出结果。，教程脚本的初始内容由团队编写，但当示例数量超过50个后，人工编写变得繁琐。因此，团队采用了高效的方法：在文件中写入注释（如`# Managing snapshots`），然后请求一个编码智能体根据代码库中已有的文档（包括已提交至Git仓库的自动生成的手册页）来填充具体示例。这一过程产生了双重效益：要么生成高质量示例，要么因生成效果不佳而暴露出`mngr`接口设计或文档的不足，从而驱动团队优化工具，使其界面尽可能简洁直观。，在将教程块转换为pytest函数时，有几个关键细节。教程块通常简洁，有时甚至有些刻意简化，但测试需要更全面，覆盖正常与异常路径。因此，这是一个1:N的对应关系：同一教程块可能因命令变体或环境差异导致不同结果，这些情况往往需要独立的测试用例。为了保持教程块与测试函数之间的可追溯性，系统要求智能体在生成的函数中，通过测试夹具中的特定API引用来“声明”其对应的教程块。此外，还使用简单脚本进行校验，确保对应关系准确无误。，整个架构体现了高度的软件可组合性与可扩展性。通过并行运行大量智能体，`mngr`不仅自动化了测试生成与执行，还将测试过程本身转化为驱动产品改进的反馈循环。这项实践预示了软件开发的未来方向：AI代理不仅能协助编码，还能通过大规模、并行的探索与验证，深度参与系统的质量保障与迭代优化过程。

AI Edge Gallery is the premier destination for running the world's most powerful open-source Large Language Models (LLMs) on your mobile device. Experience high-performance Generative AI directly on your hardware—fully offline, private, and lightning-fast. Now Featuring: Gemma 4 The latest version brings official support for the newly released Gemma 4 family. As the centerpiece of this release, Gemma 4 allows you to test the cutting edge of on-device AI. Experience advanced reasoning, logic, and creative capabilities without ever sending your data to a server. Install the app today from Google Play Install the app today from App Store For users without Google Play access, install the apk from the latest release App Preview ✨ Core Features Agent Skills : Transform your LLM from a conversationalist into a proactive assistant. Use the Agent Skills tile to augment model capabilities with tools like Wikipedia for fact-grounding, interactive maps, and rich visual summary cards. You can even load modular skills from a URL or browse community contributions on GitHub Discussions. AI Chat with Thinking Mode : Engage in fluid, multi-turn conversations and toggle the new Thinking Mode to peek "under the hood." This feature allows you to see the model’s step-by-step reasoning process, which is perfect for understanding complex problem-solving. Note: Thinking Mode currently works with supported models, starting with the Gemma 4 family. Ask Image : Use multimodal power to identify objects, solve visual puzzles, or get detailed descriptions using your device’s camera or photo gallery. Audio Scribe : Transcribe and translate voice recordings into text in real-time using high-efficiency on-device language models. Prompt Lab : A dedicated workspace to test different prompts and single-turn use c
title_zh: 谷歌AI边缘/图库 - 一个展示设备端机器学习/生成式人工智能用例，并允许人们在本地试用和使用模型的图库。
summary_zh: 谷歌AI Edge团队在GitHub上开源了“google-ai-edge/gallery”项目，这是一个展示设备端机器学习和生成式AI用例的画廊，允许用户在本地尝试和使用模型。该项目旨在让用户直接在移动设备上体验高性能的生成式AI，完全离线、私密且快速。，其核心是AI Edge Gallery应用，它是用户在移动设备上运行世界顶级开源大语言模型的平台。最新版本的核心亮点是正式支持新发布的Gemma 4模型系列，让用户能在设备上测试前沿的AI能力，体验先进的推理、逻辑和创意功能，且所有数据处理均在本地完成，无需上传至服务器。，应用提供多项核心功能：，1. 智能体技能：通过“Agent Skills”功能，将LLM从对话工具转变为主动助手。该功能通过集成诸如维基百科（用于事实核查）、交互式地图和丰富的视觉摘要卡片等工具来增强模型能力。用户可以从URL加载模块化技能，或在GitHub Discussions上浏览社区贡献的技能。，2. 带思考模式的AI聊天：支持流畅的多轮对话，并可开启新的“Thinking Mode”来观察模型的逐步推理过程。这有助于用户理解复杂的解决问题步骤。目前该模式从Gemma 4系列开始，在支持的模型上可用。，3. 图像问答：利用多模态能力，通过设备摄像头或相册识别物体、解决视觉谜题或获取详细描述。，4. 音频转录：使用高效的设备端语言模型，将语音录音实时转录并翻译成文本。，5. 提示词实验室：一个专门的工作区，用于测试不同的提示词和单轮用例。，该项目强调隐私、低延迟和离线可用性，为用户和开发者提供了一个探索和评估设备端生成式AI未来的实践平台。应用可通过Google Play商店、Apple App Store获取，对于无法访问Google Play的用户，也提供了最新版本的APK直接安装文件。

title_zh: block/goose——超越代码建议的开源可扩展AI助手：支持任意大语言模型的安装、执行、编辑与测试
summary_zh: 开源AI智能体项目block/goose近日发布，这是一个超越代码建议的、可扩展的AI代理工具。用户可以通过它安装、执行、编辑和测试任何大型语言模型（LLM）。，goose被设计为运行在本地的、开源的AI智能体，能够从头到尾自动化复杂的开发任务。它不仅仅提供代码建议，更能从零开始构建整个项目，编写并执行代码，调试故障，编排工作流程，以及与外部API进行自主交互。无论是原型设计、代码优化还是管理复杂的工程流水线，goose都能适应用户的工作流程并精确执行任务。，该项目的核心特点在于其高度的灵活性。它能够与任何LLM协同工作，并支持多模型配置以优化性能和成本。它可以无缝集成MCP服务器，并同时提供桌面应用程序和命令行界面两种使用方式，旨在成为帮助开发者提升效率、专注于创新的终极AI助手。，项目在GitHub上已获得大量关注，拥有数万星标，显示了开发者社区对其潜力的认可。其开源和可扩展的特性，为开发者根据自身需求定制和增强AI代理功能提供了可能。

Dismiss alert onyx-dot-app / onyx Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 3.3k Star 24.7k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 7,255 Commits 7,255 Commits .claude .claude .cursor .cursor .github .github .greptile .greptile .vscode .vscode backend backend cli cli contributor_ip_assignment contributor_ip_assignment deployment deployment desktop desktop docs docs examples examples extensions/ chrome extensions/ chrome profiling/ grafana/ dashboards/ onyx profiling/ grafana/ dashboards/ onyx tools/ ods tools/ ods web web widget widget .git-blame-ignore-revs .git-blame-ignore-revs .gitignore .gitignore .pre-commit-config.yaml .pre-commit-config.yaml .prettierignore .prettierignore AGENTS.md AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md ct.yaml ct.yaml cubic.yaml cubic.yaml docker-bake.hcl docker-bake.hcl pyproject.toml pyproject.toml uv.lock uv.lock View all files Repository files navigation Onyx - The Open Source AI Platform Onyx is the application layer for LLMs - bringing a feature-rich interface that can be easily hosted by anyone. Onyx enables LLMs through advanced capabilities like RAG, web search, code execution, file creation, deep research and more. Connect your applications with over 50+ indexing based connectors provided out of the box or via MCP. Tip Deploy with a single command: curl -fsSL https://onyx.app/install_onyx.sh | bash ⭐ Features 🔍 Agentic RAG: Get best in class search and answer quality based on hybrid index + AI Agents for information retrieval Benchmark to release soon! 🔬 Deep Research: Get in depth reports with a multi-step research flow. Top of leaderboard as of Feb 2026. 🤖 Custom Agents: Build AI Agents with unique instructions, knowledge, and actions. 🌍 Web Search: Browse the web to get up to date information. Supports Serper, Google PSE, Brave, SearXNG, and others. Comes with an in house web crawler and support for Firecrawl/Exa. 📄 Artifacts: Generate documents, graphics, and other downloadable artifacts. ▶️ Actions & MCP: Let Onyx agents interact with external applications, comes with flexible Auth options. 💻 Code Execution: Execute code in a sandbox to analyze data, render graphs, or modify files. 🎙️ Voice Mode: Chat with Onyx via text-to-speech and speech-to-text. 🎨 Image Generation: Generate images based on user prompts. Onyx supports all major LLM providers, both self-hosted (like Ollama, LiteLLM, vLLM, etc.) and proprietary (like Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.).
title_zh: onyx-dot-app/onyx - 开源人工智能平台 - 具备先进功能、兼容所有大型语言模型的AI聊天系统
summary_zh: Onyx是一个开源AI平台，作为LLM的应用层，提供了一个功能丰富的界面，可供任何人轻松部署。其核心价值在于能够与所有主流LLM协同工作，无论是自托管模型（如Ollama、LiteLLM、vLLM）还是专有模型（如Anthropic的Claude、OpenAI的GPT、Google的Gemini等）。，该平台集成了多项高级功能，旨在扩展LLM的能力。其关键特性包括：具备代理能力的RAG（检索增强生成）系统，它结合了混合索引和AI代理进行信息检索，以提供一流的搜索和回答质量；深度研究功能，通过多步骤研究流程生成深入报告；支持构建自定义AI代理，允许用户定义独特的指令、知识和操作。，Onyx还提供了广泛的连接与执行能力。它内置了50多个基于索引的连接器（支持MCP），可轻松连接外部应用。平台支持网络搜索，能获取最新信息，兼容Serper、Google PSE、Brave、SearXNG等搜索引擎，并自带网络爬虫及对Firecrawl/Exa的支持。其他重要功能包括：代码执行（在沙箱中运行代码以分析数据或修改文件）、生成可下载的文档与图形等“工件”、图像生成、语音交互模式（支持文本转语音和语音转文本），以及通过Actions和MCP让代理与外部应用安全交互的灵活身份验证选项。，部署过程简便，支持单命令安装。该项目在GitHub上获得了大量关注，显示出社区对其作为通用、强大且可自托管AI聊天平台价值的认可。

Approved contributors can still open issues and PRs if something is genuinely urgent, but please keep that to pressing matters only. For support, join Discord . Current focus: at the moment i'm deep in refactoring internals, and need to focus. pi.dev domain graciously donated by exe.dev Pi Monorepo Looking for the pi coding agent? See packages/coding-agent for installation and usage. Tools for building AI agents and managing LLM deployments. Packages Package Description @mariozechner/pi-ai Unified multi-provider LLM API (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.) @mariozechner/pi-agent-core Agent runtime with tool calling and state management @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent Interactive coding agent CLI @mariozechner/pi-mom Slack bot that delegates messages to the pi coding agent @mariozechner/pi-tui Terminal UI library with differential rendering @mariozechner/pi-web-ui Web components for AI chat interfaces @mariozechner/pi-pods CLI for managing vLLM deployments on GPU pods Contributing See CONTRIBUTING.md for contribution guidelines and AGENTS.md for project-specific rules (for both humans and agents). Development npm install # Install all dependencies npm run build # Build all packages npm run check # Lint, format, and type check ./test.sh # Run tests (skips LLM-dependent tests without API keys) ./pi-test.sh # Run pi from sources (can be run from any directory) Note: npm run check requires npm run build to be run first. The web-ui package uses tsc which needs compiled .d.ts files from dependencies. title_zh: badlogic/pi-mono - AI 智能体工具包：编码智能体 CLI、统一 LLM API、TUI 与 Web UI 库、Slack 机器人、vLLM 容器
summary_zh: 开发者Mario Zechner在GitHub上开源了名为“pi-mono”的AI智能体工具包项目。该项目是一个功能全面的单体仓库（monorepo），旨在为构建AI智能体和管理大语言模型（LLM）部署提供一套集成工具。，项目核心包含多个独立的npm包，每个包针对特定功能：@mariozechner/pi-ai提供了一个统一的、支持多供应商（如OpenAI、Anthropic、Google等）的LLM API层，简化了不同模型服务的调用。@mariozechner/pi-agent-core是智能体运行时的核心库，负责工具调用和状态管理。@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent是一个交互式的编码智能体命令行界面（CLI），可直接用于辅助编程任务。，在用户界面方面，项目提供了@mariozechner/pi-tui终端用户界面库，采用差异渲染技术优化性能；以及@mariozechner/pi-web-ui用于构建AI聊天界面的Web组件库。此外，项目还包含一个Slack机器人集成包（@mariozechner/pi-mom），可将Slack消息委托给编码智能体处理。，针对LLM部署，工具包提供了@mariozechner/pi-pods，这是一个用于在GPU Pod上管理vLLM（一个高性能LLM推理和服务库）部署的CLI工具，便于用户在实际硬件上运行和扩展模型服务。，项目采用TypeScript开发，使用biome进行代码检查和格式化，并提供了完整的开发脚本（如构建、测试）。整个项目在MIT许可证下开源，鼓励社区贡献，并制定了详细的贡献指南和针对人类与AI智能体的特定项目规则。

Dismiss alert dmtrKovalenko / fff.nvim Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 147 Star 3.5k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 190 Commits 190 Commits .cargo .cargo .github/ workflows .github/ workflows crates crates doc doc lua lua packages packages plugin plugin scripts scripts tests tests .gitignore .gitignore .luacheckrc .luacheckrc .luarc.ci.json .luarc.ci.json .luarc.json .luarc.json .mcp.json .mcp.json .nixignore .nixignore .stylua.toml .stylua.toml Cargo.lock Cargo.lock Cargo.toml Cargo.toml LICENSE LICENSE Makefile Makefile README.md README.md _typos.toml _typos.toml biome.json biome.json bun.lock bun.lock chart.png chart.png empty_config.lua empty_config.lua flake.lock flake.lock flake.nix flake.nix install-mcp.sh install-mcp.sh package-lock.json package-lock.json package.json package.json rust-toolchain.toml rust-toolchain.toml View all files Repository files navigation FFF AI agents (MCP) | Neovim users A fast file search for your AI and neovim, with memory built-in FFF stands for freakin fast fuzzy file finder (pick 3) and it is an opinionated fuzzy file picker for your AI agent and Neovim. Just for file search, but we do the file search really fff well. FFF is a tool for grepping, fuzzy file matching, globbing, and multigrepping with a strong focus on performance and useful search results. For humans - provides an unbelievable typo-resistant experience, for AI agents - implements the fastest file search with additional free memory suggesting the best search results based on various factors like frecency, git status, file size, definition matches, and more. MCP FFF is an amazing way to reduce the time and tokens by giving your AI agent a bit of memory built-in to their file search tools. It makes your AI harness to find the code faster and spend less tokens by doing less roundtrips and reading less useless files. You can install FFF as a dependency for your AI agent using a simple bash script: curl -L https://dmtrkovalenko.dev/install-fff-mcp.sh | bash The installation script is here ./install-mcp.sh if you want to review it before running. It will print out the instructions on how to connect it to your Claude Code , Codex , OpenCode , etc. Once you have it connected just ask your agent to "use fff". Here is an example addition to CLAUDE.md that works perfectly: # CLAUDE.md For any file search or grep in the current git indexed directory use fff tools Neovim guide Here is some demo on the linux repository (100k
title_zh: dmtrKovalenko/fff.nvim - 面向AI代理、Neovim、Rust、C和NodeJS的最快最准确文件搜索工具包
summary_zh: 开发者 dmtrKovalenko 在 GitHub 上发布了 fff.nvim 项目，这是一个专为 AI 代理、Neovim、Rust、C 和 NodeJS 设计的高速且高精度的文件搜索工具包。FFF 代表“freakin fast fuzzy file finder”，是一个专注于文件搜索的、具有明确设计理念的模糊文件选择器。，该工具的核心功能是进行 grep 搜索、模糊文件匹配、通配符匹配和多文件 grep，其设计重点在于极致的性能和提供有用的搜索结果。对于人类用户，它能提供难以置信的容错体验；对于 AI 代理，它实现了最快的文件搜索，并内置了额外的“记忆”功能，能够根据访问频率（frecency）、git 状态、文件大小、定义匹配等多种因素，智能推荐最佳搜索结果。，作为 MCP（Model Context Protocol）工具，FFF 的主要价值在于能显著减少 AI 代理（如 Claude Code、Codex、OpenCode 等）的响应时间和 token 消耗。它通过内置的“记忆”机制，让 AI 代理能更快地定位代码，减少不必要的往返查询和无效文件的读取，从而节省 token 使用量。，安装过程简便，用户可通过运行提供的 bash 脚本（curl -L https://dmtrkovalenko.dev/install-fff-mcp.sh | bash）将其添加为 AI 代理的依赖。安装后，只需在代理配置（如 CLAUDE.md）中指示代理“使用 fff”即可。该项目在大型代码库（如拥有 10 万个文件的 Linux 内核仓库）中进行了演示，展现了其处理海量文件的强大能力。

" 🌟 Key Features 📱 Cross-Platform Support : Android, iOS, Web, Desktop, and IoT (e.g. Raspberry Pi). 🚀 Hardware Acceleration : Peak performance via GPU and NPU accelerators. 👁️ Multi-Modality : Support for vision and audio inputs. 🔧 Tool Use : Function calling support for agentic workflows. 📚 B
summary_zh: 谷歌AI团队在GitHub上开源了其生产就绪的高性能边缘设备大语言模型推理框架LiteRT-LM。该项目旨在为边缘设备部署大型语言模型提供高效解决方案，目前已获得超过1.3k星标。，LiteRT-LM的核心定位是一个跨平台、高性能的开源推理框架，专门针对边缘计算环境优化。其关键特性包括广泛的硬件兼容性，支持Android、iOS、Web、桌面端及物联网设备（如树莓派）；通过GPU和NPU实现硬件加速以获得峰值性能；支持多模态输入，涵盖视觉和音频数据；提供函数调用能力以支持智能体工作流。，技术架构上，项目采用Bazel构建系统，集成Rust、C++、Python和Kotlin等多种编程语言支持，并包含完整的工具链和测试套件。近期重要更新是新增了对Gemma 4模型的支持，用户可通过Hugging Face仓库直接部署该模型。官方提供了便捷的CLI工具，在Linux、macOS、Windows（WSL）及树莓派系统上均可通过简单命令快速运行模型推理。，该项目通过预构建配置和运行时优化，显著降低了在资源受限设备上部署LLM的技术门槛。其开源协议允许开发者自由使用和修改，配套文档和示例代码为实际部署提供了详细指导。作为谷歌推出的生产级框架，LiteRT-LM有望推动大语言模型在移动设备和边缘计算场景的普及应用。
